std::path::Path;\nuse std::str::FromStr;\nuse std::sync::Mutex;\nuse std::time::Duration;\n\nconst MAX_RETRIES: u32 = 5;\nconst RETRY_BASE_MS: u64 = 50;\n\npub struct Storage {\n    conn: Mutex<Connection>,\n}\n\nimpl Storage {\n    pub fn open(db_path: &Path) -> Result<Self> {\n        let conn = Connection::open(db_path)?;\n        ensure_wal_mode(&conn)?;\n        apply_schema(&conn)?;\n        Ok(Storage { conn: Mutex::new(conn) })\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_write_transaction<T, F>(&self, f: F) -> Result<T>\n    where\n        F: FnOnce(&Transaction) -> Result<T>,\n    {\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let tx = conn.unchecked_transaction()?;\n        match f(&tx) {\n            Ok(result) => {\n                tx.commit()?;\n                drop(conn);\n                Ok(result)\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                let _ = tx.rollback();\n                Err(e)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_immediate_transaction<T, F>(&self, f: F) -> Result<T>\n    where\n        F: FnOnce(&Transaction) -> Result<T>,\n    {\n        let mut attempt = 0;\n        loop {\n            let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n            match conn.transaction_with_behavior(TransactionBehavior::Immediate) {\n                Err(e) if is_busy_error(&e) && attempt < MAX_RETRIES => {\n                    drop(conn);\n                    attempt += 1;\n                    std::thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(RETRY_BASE_MS * attempt as u64));\n                    continue;\n                }\n                Err(e) => return Err(e.into()),\n                Ok(tx) => {\n                    // tx borrows from conn, so conn must stay alive\n                    // We move the result into a block that owns both\n                    let result = (|| {\n                        let result = f(&tx)?;\n                        tx.commit()?;\n                        Ok(result)\n                    })();\n                    // conn is dropped here after tx and result are done\n                    drop(conn);\n                    return result;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn get_issue(&self, id: &str) -> Result<Option<Issue>> {\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let mut stmt = conn.prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, content_hash, title, description, design, acceptance_criteria, notes,\n                    status, priority, issue_type, assignee, owner, estimated_minutes,\n                    created_at, created_by, updated_at, closed_at, close_reason,\n                    closed_by_session, due_at, defer_until, external_ref, source_system,\n                    source_repo, deleted_at, deleted_by, delete_reason, original_type,\n                    compaction_level, compacted_at, compacted_at_commit, original_size,\n                    sender, ephemeral, pinned, is_template\n             FROM issues WHERE id = ?1\",\n        )?;\n        let mut rows = stmt.query(params![id])?;\n        if let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n            Ok(Some(self.row_to_issue(row)?))\n        } else {\n            Ok(None)\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn list_issues(&self, filter: &IssueFilter) -> Result<Vec<Issue>> {\n        let mut query = String::from(\n            \"SELECT id, content_hash, title, description, design, acceptance_criteria, notes,\n                    status, priority, issue_type, assignee, owner, estimated_minutes,\n                    created_at, created_by, updated_at, closed_at,             compaction_level, compacted_at, compacted_at_commit, original_size,\n                    sender, ephemeral, pinned, is_template\n             FROM issues WHERE deleted_at IS NULL\",\n        );\n        let mut params = Vec::new();\n        let mut param_idx = 1;\n        if let Some(ref status) = filter.status {\n            query.push_str(&format!(\" AND status = ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(status.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        if let Some(ref issue_type) = filter.issue_type {\n            query.push_str(&format!(\" AND issue_type = ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(issue_type.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        if let Some(ref assignee) = filter.assignee {\n            query.push_str(&format!(\" AND assignee = ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(assignee.clone());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        if let Some(priority) = filter.priority {\n            query.push_str(&format!(\" AND priority = ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(priority.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        query.push_str(\" ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at ASC\");\n        if let Some(limit) = filter.limit {\n            query.push_str(&format!(\" LIMIT {}\", limit));\n        }\n        if let Some(offset) = filter.offset {\n            query.push_str(&format!(\" OFFSET {}\", offset));\n        }\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let mut stmt = conn.prepare(&query)?;\n        let param_refs: Vec<&dyn rusqlite::ToSql> = params.iter().map(|p| p as &dyn rusqlite::ToSql).collect();\n        let mut rows = stmt.query(param_refs.as_slice())?;\n        let mut issues = Vec::new();\n        while let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n            issues.push(self.row_to_issue(row)?);\n        }\n        Ok(issues)\n    }\n\n    pub fn list_all_issues(&self) -> Result<Vec<Issue>> {\n        let conn = original_size,\n                    sender, ephemeral, pinned, is_template\n             FROM issues WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id\",\n        )?;\n        let mut rows = stmt.query([])?;\n i.description, i.design, i.acceptance_criteria, i.notes,\n                    i.status, i.priority, i.issue_type, i.assignee, i.owner, i.estimated_minutes,\n                    i.created_at, i.ephemeral, i.pinned, i.is_template\n             FROM issues i\n             INNER JOIN dirty_issues d ON i.id = d.issue_id\n             ORDER BY i.id\",\n        )?;\n        let mut rows = issue: &Issue) -> Result<()> {\n        self.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            tx.execute(\n                \"INSERT INTO issues (\n                    id, content_hash, title, description, design, acceptance_criteria, notes,\n                    status, priority, issue_type, assignee, owner, estimated_minutes,\n                    created_at, created_by, updated_at, &issue.source_repo, issue.deleted_at.map(|d| d.to_rfc3339()), &issue.deleted_by,\n                    &issue.delete_reason, &issue.original_type, &issue.compaction_level,\n                    issue.compacted_at.map(|d| d.to_rfc3339()), &issue.compacted_at_commit,\n                    &issue.original_size, &issue.sender,\n                    if issue.ephemeral { 1 } else { 0 },\n                    if issue.pinned { 1 } else { 0 },\n                    if issue.is_template { 1 } else { 0 },\n                ],\n            )?;\n            for label in &issue.labels {\n                tx.execute(\"INSERT INTO labels (issue_id, label) VALUES (?1, ?2)\", params![&issue.id, label])?;\n            }\n            for dep in &issue.dependencies {\n                tx.execute(\n params![\n                        &dep.issue_id, &dep.depends_on_id, &dep.dep_type.to_string(),\n                        dep.metadata.as_ref().map(|m| serde_json::to_string(m).ok()).flatten(),\n })\n    }\n\n    pub fn update_issue(&self, id: &str, changes: &IssueChanges) -> Result<()> {\n        self.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            let mut updates = Vec::new();\n            let mut params: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n            if let Some(ref title) = changes.title {\n                updates.push(\"title = ?\");\n                params.push(title.clone());\n            }\n            if let Some(ref description) = changes.description {\n                updates.push(\"description = ?\");\n                params.push(description.clone());\n            }\n            if let Some(ref status) = changes.status {\n                updates.push(\"status = ?\");\n                params.push(status.to_string());\n            }\n            if let Some(priority) = changes.priority {\n                updates.push(\"priority = ?\");\n                params.push(priority.to_string());\n            }\n            if let Some(ref issue_type) = changes.issue_type {\n                updates.push(\"issue_type = ?\");\n                params.push(issue_type.to_string());\n            }\n            if let Some(ref assignee) = changes.assignee {\n                updates.push(\"assignee = ?\");\n                params.push(assignee.clone());\n            }\n            if !updates.is_empty() {\n                updates.push(\"updated_at = ?\");\n                let now = Utc::now().to_rfc3339();\n                params.push(now);\n                let query = format!(\"UPDATE issues SET {} WHERE id = ?\", updates.join(\", \"));\n                let mut all_params = params.clone();\n                all_params.push(id.to_string());\n                let param_refs: Vec<&dyn rusqlite::ToSql> =\n                    all_params.iter().map(|p| p as &dyn rusqlite::ToSql).collect();\n                tx.execute(&query, param_refs.as_slice())?;\n            }\n            Ok(())\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub fn close_issue(&self, id: &str, reason: &str, actor: &str) -> Result<()> {\n        self.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            let now = Utc::now();\n            tx.execute(\n                \"UPDATE issues SET status = 'closed', closed_at = ?, close_reason = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?\",\n                params![now.to_rfc3339(), reason, now.to_rfc3339(), id],\n            )?;\n            tx.execute(\n                \"INSERT INTO events (issue_id, event_type, actor, old_value, new_value, created_at) VALUES (?1, 'closed', ?2, NULL, ?3, ?4)\",\n                params![id, actor, reason, now.to_rfc3339()],\n            )?;\n            Ok(())\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub fn count_issues(&self) -> Result<usize> {\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let count: i64 = conn.query_row(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues\", [], |row| row.get(0))?;\n        Ok(count as usize)\n    }\n\n    pub fn sync_from_jsonl(&self, jsonl_path: &Path) -> Result<ImportResult> {\n        import_jsonl(jsonl_path, |issue| {\n            let existing = self.get_issue(&issue.id)?;\n            match existing {\n                None => {\n                    self.create_issue(issue)?;\n                    Ok(true)\n                }\n                Some(_) => Ok(false),\n            }\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub fn sync_to_jsonl(&self, jsonl_path: &Path, dirty_only: bool) -> Result<usize> {\n        if dirty_only {\n            let result = export_jsonl_dirty(jsonl_path, || self.list_dirty_issues(), || self.clear_dirty())?;\n            Ok(result.count)\n        } else {\n            let result = export_jsonl(jsonl_path, || self.list_all_issues())?;\n            Ok(result.count)\n        }\n    }\n\n    fn row_to_issue(&self, row: &rusqlite::Row) -> Result<Issue> {\n        let status_str: String = row.get(7)?;\n        let type_str: String = row.get(9)?;\n        let parse_opt_dt = |idx: usize| -> Result<Option<DateTime<Utc>>> {\n            let s: Option<String> = row.get(idx)?;\n            match s {\n                None => Ok(None),\n                Some(ref val) if val.is_empty() => Ok(None),\n                Some(val) => Ok(Some(parse_datetime(val)?)),\n            }\n        };\n        Ok(Issue {\n            id: row.get(0)?,\n            content_hash: row.get(1)?,\n            title: row.get(2)?,\n            description: row.get(3)?,\n            design: row.get(4)?,\n            acceptance_criteria: row.get(5)?,\n            notes: row.get(6)?,\n            status: Status::from_str(&status_str).unwrap_or(Status::Custom(status_str)),\n            priority: row.get(8)?,\n            issue_type: IssueType::from_str(&type_str).unwrap_or(IssueType::Custom(type_str)),\n            assignee: row.get(10)?,\n            owner: row.get(11)?,\n            estimated_minutes: row.get(12)?,\n            created_at: parse_datetime(row.get(13)?)?,\n            created_by: row.get(14)?,\n            updated_at: parse_datetime(row.get(15)?)?,\n            closed_at: parse_opt_dt(16)?,\n            close_reason: row.get(17)?,\n            closed_by_session: row.get(18)?,\n            due_at: parse_opt_dt(19)?,\n            defer_until: parse_opt_dt(20)?,\n            external_ref: row.get(21)?,\n            source_system: row.get(22)?,\n            source_repo: row.get(23)?,\n            deleted_at: parse_opt_dt(24)?,\n            deleted_by: row.get(25)?,\n            delete_reason: row.get(26)?,\n            original_type: row.get(27)?,\n            compaction_level: row.get(28)?,\n            compacted_at: parse_opt_dt(29)?,\n            compacted_at_commit: row.get(30)?,\n            original_size: row.get(31)?,\n            sender: row.get(32)?,\n            ephemeral: row.get::<_, i32>(33)? != 0,\n            pinned: row.get::<_, i32>(34)? != 0,\n            is_template: row.get::<_, i32>(35)? != 0,\n            labels: self.load_labels(&row.get::<_, String>(0)?)?,\n            dependencies: self.load_dependencies(&row.get::<_, String>(0)?)?,\n            comments: self.load_comments(&row.get::<_, String>(0)?)?,\n        })\n    }\n\n    fn load_labels(&self, issue_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>> {\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let mut stmt = conn.prepare(\"SELECT label FROM labels WHERE issue_id = ?1\")?;\n        let mut rows = stmt.query(params![issue_id])?;\n        let mut labels = Vec::new();\n        while let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n            labels.push(row.get(0)?);\n        }\n        Ok(labels)\n    }\n\n    fn load_dependencies(&self, issue_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<Dependency>> {\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let mut stmt = conn.prepare(\n            \"SELECT issue_id, depends_on_id, type, metadata, thread_id, created_at, created_by FROM dependencies WHERE issue_id = ?1\",\n        )?;\n        let mut rows = stmt.query(params![issue_id])?;\n        let mut deps = Vec::new();\n        while let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n            let type_str: String = row.get(2)?;\n            deps.push(Dependency {\n                issue_id: row.get(0)?,\n                depends_on_id: row.get(1)?,\n                dep_type: DependencyType::from_str(&type_str).unwrap_or(DependencyType::Custom(type_str)),\n                metadata: row.get::<_, Option<String>>(3)?.and_then(|s| serde_json::from_str(&s).ok()),\n                thread_id: row.get(4)?,\n                created_at: parse_datetime(row.get(5)?)?,\n                created_by: row.get(6)?,\n            });\n        }\n        Ok(deps)\n    }\n\n    fn load_comments(&self, issue_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<Comment>> {\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let mut stmt = conn.prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, issue_id, author, text, created_at FROM comments WHERE issue_id = ?1\",\n        )?;\n        let mut rows = stmt.query(params![issue_id])?;\n        let mut comments = Vec::new();\n        while let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n            comments.push(Comment {\n                id: row.get(0)?,\n                issue_id: row.get(1)?,\n                author: row.get(2)?,\n                body: row.get(3)?,\n                created_at: parse_datetime(row.get(4)?)?,\n            });\n        }\n        Ok(comments)\n    }\n\n    pub fn add_dependency(&self, issue_id: &str, depends_on_id: &str, dep_type: dependencies (issue_id, depends_on_id, type, created_at, created_by) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5)\",\n                params![issue_id, depends_on_id, dep_type.to_string(), now.to_rfc3339(), created_by],\n            )?;\n            Ok(())\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub fn remove_dependency(&self, issue_id: &str, depends_on_id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n })\n    }\n\n    pub fn get_dependencies(&self, issue_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<Dependency>> {\n        self.load_dependencies(issue_id)\n    }\n\n    pub fn get_dependents(&self, depends_on_id: &str) pub fn add_label(&self, issue_id: &str, label: &str) -> Result<()> {\n        self.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            tx.execute(\"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO labels (issue_id, label) VALUES       })\n    }\n\n    pub fn list_comments(&self, issue_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<Comment>> {\n        self.load_comments(issue_id)\n    }\n\n    pub fn search_issues(&self, query: Option<&str>, status: &[Status], issue_type: &[IssueType], assignee: Option<&str>, labels: &[String], priority_min: Option<i32>, priority_max: Option<i32>, limit: usize) -> Result<Vec<Issue>> {\n        let mut sql = String::from(\n            \"SELECT DISTINCT i.id, i.content_hash, i.title, i.description, i.design, i.acceptance_criteria, i.notes,\n                    i.status, i.priority, i.issue_type, i.assignee, i.owner, i.estimated_minutes,\n                    i.created_at, i.created_by, i.updated_at, i.closed_at, i.close_reason,\n                    i.closed_by_session, i.due_at, i.defer_until, i.external_ref, i.source_system,\n                    i.source_repo, i.deleted_at, i.deleted_by, i.delete_reason, i.original_type,\n                    i.compaction_level, i.compacted_at, i.compacted_at_commit, i.original_size,\n                    i.sender, i.ephemeral, i.pinned, i.is_template\n             FROM issues i\n             LEFT JOIN labels l ON i.id = l.issue_id\n             WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL\",\n        );\n        let mut params = Vec::new();\n        let mut param_idx = 1;\n        if let Some(q) = query {\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" AND (i.title LIKE ?{} OR i.description LIKE ?{})\", param_idx, param_idx + 1));\n            params.push(format!(\"%{}%\", q));\n            params.push(format!(\"%{}%\", q));\n            param_idx += 2;\n        }\n        for s in status {\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" AND i.status = ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(s.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        for t in issue_type {\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" AND i.issue_type = ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(t.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        if let Some(a) = assignee {\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" AND i.assignee = ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(a.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        if !labels.is_empty() {\n            let label_conditions: Vec<String> = labels.iter().enumerate().map(|(i, _)| format!(\"l.label = ?{}\", param_idx + i)).collect();\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" AND ({}) \", label_conditions.join(\" OR \")));\n            for label in labels {\n                params.push(label.clone());\n                param_idx += 1;\n            }\n        }\n        if let Some(min) = priority_min {\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" AND i.priority >= ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(min.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        if let Some(max) = priority_max {\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" AND i.priority <= ?{}\", param_idx));\n            params.push(max.to_string());\n            param_idx += 1;\n        }\n        sql.push_str(\" ORDER BY i.priority ASC, i.created_at ASC\");\n        if limit > 0 {\n            sql.push_str(&format!(\" LIMIT {}\", limit));\n        }\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let mut stmt = conn.prepare(&sql)?;\n        let param_refs: Vec<&dyn rusqlite::ToSql> = params.iter().map(|p| p as &dyn rusqlite::ToSql).collect();\n        let mut rows = stmt.query(param_refs.as_slice())?;\n        let mut issues = Vec::new();\n        while let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n            issues.push(self.row_to_issue(row)?);\n        }\n        Ok(issues)\n    }\n\n    pub fn get_stats(&self) -> Result<Stats> {\n        let conn = self.conn.lock().unwrap();\n        let total: i64 = conn.query_row(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE deleted_at IS NULL\", [], |row| row.get(0))?;\n        let open: i64 = conn.query_row(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'open' AND deleted_at IS NULL\", [], |row| row.get(0))?;\n        let Harness\n156\t        #[arg(long)]\n157\t        harness: Option<String>,\n158\t\n159\t        /// Harness version\n160\t        #[arg(long)]\n161\t        harness_version: Option<String>,\n162\t\n163\t        /// Dry run (show what would be claimed without claiming)\n164\t        #[arg(long)]\n165\t        dry_run: bool,\n166\t\n167\t        /// Output format (text, json)\n168\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n169\t        format: String,\n170\t    },\n171\t\n172\t    /// Initialize a new workspace\n173\t    Init {\n174\t        /// Issue prefix\n175\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"bf\")]\n176\t        prefix: String,\n177\t    },\n178\t\n179\t    /// Sync (flush to JSONL or import from JSONL)\n180\t    Sync {\n181\t        /// Flush only (SQLite -> JSONL)\n182\t        #[arg(long)]\n183\t        flush_only: bool,\n184\t\n185\t        /// Import only (JSONL -> SQLite)\n186\t        #[arg(long)]\n187\t        import_only: bool,\n188\t    },\n189\t\n190\t    /// Doctor - check and repair\n191\t    Doctor {\n192\t        /// Repair database\n193\t        #[arg(long)]\n194\t        repair: bool,\n195\t    },\n196\t\n197\t    /// Count beads\n198\t    Count {\n199\t        /// Filter by status\n200\t        #[arg(long)]\n201\t        status: Option<String>,\n202\t    },\n203\t\n204\t    /// Batch operations (atomic)\n205\t    Batch {\n206\t        /// JSON file containing operations\n207\t        #[arg(long)]\n208\t        file: Option<PathBuf>,\n209\t\n210\t        /// JSON string containing operations\n211\t        #[arg(long)]\n212\t        json: Option<String>,\n213\t\n214\t        /// Read from stdin\n215\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"false\")]\n216\t        stdin: bool,\n217\t    },\n218\t\n219\t    /// Manage dependencies\n220\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n221\t    Dep(DepCommands),\n222\t\n223\t    /// Manage labels\n224\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n225\t    Label(LabelCommands),\n226\t\n227\t    /// Manage comments\n228\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n229\t    Comments(CommentsCommands),\n230\t\n231\t    /// Search beads\n232\t    Search {\n233\t        /// Search query\n234\t        query: Option<String>,\n235\t\n236\t        /// Filter by status\n237\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n238\t        status: Vec<String>,\n239\t\n240\t        /// Filter by type\n241\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n242\t        type_: Vec<String>,\n243\t\n244\t        /// Filter by assignee\n245\t        #[arg(long)]\n246\t        assignee: Option<String>,\n247\t\n248\t        /// Filter by label\n249\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n250\t        label: Vec<String>,\n251\t\n252\t        /// Filter by minimum priority\n253\t        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MIN\")]\n254\t        priority_min: Option<i32>,\n255\t\n256\t        /// Filter by maximum priority\n257\t        #[arg(long, value_name = \"MAX\")]\n258\t        priority_max: Option<i32>,\n259\t\n260\t        /// Limit results\n261\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"50\")]\n262\t        limit: usize,\n263\t\n264\t        /// Output format (text, json)\n265\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n266\t        format: String,\n267\t    },\n268\t\n269\t    /// Show statistics\n270\t    Stats {\n271\t        /// Show breakdown by type\n272\t        #[arg(long)]\n273\t        by_type: bool,\n274\t\n275\t        /// Show breakdown by priority\n276\t        #[arg(long)]\n277\t        by_priority: bool,\n278\t\n279\t        /// Show breakdown by assignee\n280\t        #[arg(long)]\n281\t        by_assignee: bool,\n282\t\n283\t        /// Show breakdown by label\n284\t        #[arg(long)]\n285\t        by_label: bool,\n286\t\n287\t        /// Output format (text, json)\n288\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n289\t        format: String,\n290\t    },\n291\t\n292\t    /// Emit JSON Schema\n293\t    Schema {\n294\t        /// Schema target\n295\t        #[arg(default_value = \"all\")]\n296\t        target: String,\n297\t\n298\t        /// Output format (text, json)\n299\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"json\")]\n300\t        format: String,\n301\t    },\n302\t\n303\t    /// Configuration management\n304\t    #[command(subcommand)]\n305\t    Config(ConfigCommands),\n306\t\n307\t    /// Show velocity stats (bead-forge specific)\n308\t    Velocity {\n309\t        /// Model\n310\t        #[arg(long)]\n311\t        model: Option<String>,\n312\t\n313\t        /// Harness\n314\t        #[arg(long)]\n315\t        harness: Option<String>,\n316\t\n317\t        /// Output format (text, json)\n318\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"text\")]\n319\t        format: String,\n320\t    },\n321\t}\n322\t\n323\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n324\tpub enum DepCommands {\n325\t    /// Add a dependency\n326\t    Add {\n327\t        /// Issue ID (the one that will depend on something)\n328\t        issue: String,\n329\t\n330\t        /// Target issue ID (the one being depended on)\n331\t        depends_on: String,\n332\t\n333\t        /// Dependency type\n334\t        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"blocks\")]\n335\t        type_: String,\n336\t    },\n337\t\n338\t    /// Remove a dependency\n339\t    Remove {\n340\t        /// Issue ID\n341\t        issue: String,\n342\t\n343\t        /// Target issue ID to remove dependency to\n344\t        depends_on: String,\n345\t    },\n346\t\n347\t    /// List dependencies of an issue\n348\t    List {\n349\t        /// Issue ID\n350\t        id: String,\n351\t    },\n352\t\n353\t    /// Show dependency tree rooted at issue\n354\t    Tree {\n355\t        /// Issue ID (root of tree)\n356\t        id: String,\n357\t\n358\t        /// Tree direction (down, up, both)\n359\t        #[arg(short, long, default_value = \"down\")]\n360\t        direction: String,\n361\t\n362\t        /// Maximum depth\n363\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"10\")]\n364\t        max_depth: usize,\n365\t    },\n366\t}\n367\t\n368\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n369\tpub enum LabelCommands {\n370\t    /// Add label(s) to issue(s)\n371\t    Add {\n372\t        /// Issue ID(s) to add label to\n373\t        #[arg(required = true)]\n374\t        issues: Vec<String>,\n375\t\n376\t        /// Label to add\n377\t        #[arg(short, long, required = true)]\n378\t        label: String,\n379\t    },\n380\t\n381\t    /// Remove label(s) from issue(s)\n382\t    Remove {\n383\t        /// Issue ID(s) to remove label from\n384\t        #[arg(required = true)]\n385\t        issues: Vec<String>,\n386\t\n387\t        /// Label to remove\n388\t        #[arg(short, long, required = true)]\n389\t        label: String,\n390\t    },\n391\t\n392\t    /// List labels for an issue or all unique labels\n393\t    List {\n394\t        /// Issue ID (optional - if omitted, lists all unique labels)\n395\t        id: Option<String>,\n396\t    },\n397\t}\n398\t\n399\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n400\tpub enum CommentsCommands {\n401\t    /// Add a comment\n402\t    Add {\n403\t        /// Issue ID\n404\t        id: String,\n405\t\n406\t        /// Comment text\n407\t        #[arg(required = true, num_args = 1..)]\n408\t        text: Vec<String>,\n409\t    },\n410\t\n411\t    /// List comments for an issue\n412\t    List {\n413\t        /// Issue ID\n414\t        id: String,\n415\t    },\n416\t}\n417\t\n418\t#[derive(Subcommand)]\n419\tpub enum ConfigCommands {\n420\t    /// List all config values\n421\t    List,\n422\t\n423\t    /// Get a specific config value\n424\t    Get {\n425\t        /// Config key\n426\t        key: String,\n427\t    },\n428\t\n429\t    /// Show config file path\n430\t    Path,\n431\t}\n432\t\n433\tpub fn run_cli() -> Result<Cli> {\n434\t    Ok(Cli::try_parse()?)\n435\t}\n436\t\n437\tpub fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<()> {\n438\t    let workspace = cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n439\t\n440\t    // For init command, we allow the .beads directory to not exist yet\n441\t    match &cli.command {\n442\t        Commands::Init { .. } => {\n443\t            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n444\t            return match cli.command {\n445\t                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n446\t                _ => unreachable!(),\n447\t            };\n448\t        }\n449\t        _ => {}\n450\t    }\n451\t\n452\t    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n453\t        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n454\t\n455\t    match cli.command {\n456\t        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n457\t        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n458\t            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n459\t        }\n460\t        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format } => {\n461\t            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n462\t        }\n463\t        Commands::Show { id, format } => cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n464\t        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n465\t            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n466\t        }\n467\t        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n468\t        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n469\t        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n470\t        Commands::Ready { limit, format } => cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format),\n471\t        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, dry_run, format } => {\n472\t            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, dry_run, &format)\n473\t        }\n474\t        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n475\t        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n476\t        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n477\t        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n478\t        Commands::Dep(dep) => cmd_dep(&beads_dir, dep),\n479\t        Commands::Label(label) => cmd_label(&beads_dir, label),\n480\t        Commands::Comments(comments) => cmd_comments(&beads_dir, comments),\n481\t        Commands::Search { query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, format } => {\n482\t            cmd_search(&beads_dir, query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, &format)\n483\t        }\n484\t        Commands::Stats { by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, format } => {\n485\t            cmd_stats(&beads_dir, by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, &format)\n486\t        }\n487\t        Commands::Schema { target, format } => cmd_schema(&target, &format),\n488\t        Commands::Config(config) => cmd_config(&beads_dir, config),\n489\t        Commands::Velocity { model, harness, format } => cmd_velocity(&beads_dir, model, harness, &format),\n490\t    }\n491\t}\n492\t\n493\tfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n494\t    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n495\t\n496\t    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n497\t    if !config_path.exists() {\n498\t        let config = format!(\n499\t            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\n500\tdefault_priority: 2\n501\tdefault_type: task\n502\tclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n503\t\"#,\n504\t            prefix\n505\t        );\n506\t        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n507\t    }\n508\t\n509\t    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n510\t    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n511\t        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n512\t        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n513\t    }\n514\t\n515\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n516\t    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n517\t\n518\t    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n519\t    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n520\t        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n521\t    }\n522\t\n523\t    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n524\t    Ok(())\n525\t}\n526\t\n527\tfn cmd_create(\n528\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n529\t    title: String,\n530\t    type_: String,\n531\t    priority: i32,\n532\t    description: Option<String>,\n533\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n534\t    labels: Vec<String>,\n535\t) -> Result<()> {\n536\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n537\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n538\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n539\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n540\t\n541\t    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n542\t    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n543\t    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n544\t\n545\t    let now = Utc::now();\n546\t    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n547\t    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n548\t    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n549\t    issue.description = description;\n550\t    issue.assignee = assignee;\n551\t    issue.labels = labels;\n552\t\n553\t    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n554\t\n555\t    println!(\"{}\", id);\n556\t    Ok(())\n557\t}\n558\t\n559\tfn cmd_list(\n560\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n561\t    status: Option<String>,\n562\t    type_: Option<String>,\n563\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n564\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n565\t    limit: Option<usize>,\n566\t    format: &str,\n567\t) -> Result<()> {\n568\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n569\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n570\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n571\t\n572\t    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n573\t    if let Some(s) = status {\n574\t        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n575\t    }\n576\t    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n577\t        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n578\t    }\n579\t    filter.assignee = assignee;\n580\t    filter.priority = priority;\n581\t    filter.limit = limit;\n582\t\n583\t    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n584\t\n585\t    match format {\n586\t        \"json\" => {\n587\t            for issue in issues {\n588\t                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n589\t            }\n590\t        }\n591\t        _ => {\n592\t            for issue in issues {\n593\t                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n594\t            }\n595\t        }\n596\t    }\n597\t\n598\t    Ok(())\n599\t}\n600\t\n601\tfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n602\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n603\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n604\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n605\t\n606\t    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n607\t\n608\t    match format {\n609\t        \"json\" => {\n610\t            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&issue)?);\n611\t        }\n612\t        _ => {\n613\t            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n614\t            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n615\t            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n616\t            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n617\t            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n618\t            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n619\t                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n620\t            }\n621\t            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n622\t                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n623\t            }\n624\t            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n625\t                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n626\t            }\n627\t        }\n628\t    }\n629\t\n630\t    Ok(())\n631\t}\n632\t\n633\tfn cmd_update(\n634\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n635\t    id: &str,\n636\t    title: Option<String>,\n637\t    status: Option<String>,\n638\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n639\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n640\t) -> Result<()> {\n641\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n642\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n643\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n644\t\n645\t    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n646\t        title,\n647\t        status: status.map(|s| Status::from_str(&s).ok()).flatten(),\n648\t        priority,\n649\t        assignee,\n650\t        ..Default::default()\n651\t    };\n652\t\n653\t    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n654\t    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n655\t    Ok(())\n656\t}\n657\t\n658\tfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n659\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n660\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n661\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n662\t\n663\t    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n664\t    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n665\t    Ok(())\n666\t}\n667\t\n668\tfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n669\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n670\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n671\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n672\t\n673\t    let changes = IssueChanges {\n674\t        status: Some(Status::Open),\n675\t        ..Default::default()\n676\t    };\n677\t\n678\t    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n679\t    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n680\t    Ok(())\n681\t}\n682\t\n683\tfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n684\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n685\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n686\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n687\t\n688\t    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n689\t        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n690\t        Ok(())\n691\t    })?;\n692\t\n693\t    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n694\t    Ok(())\n695\t}\n696\t\n697\tfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n698\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n699\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n700\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n701\t\n702\t    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n703\t        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n704\t    })?;\n705\t\n706\t    match format {\n707\t        \"json\" => {\n708\t            for candidate in candidates {\n709\t                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n710\t            }\n711\t        }\n712\t        _ => {\n713\t            for candidate in candidates {\n714\t                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n715\t                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n716\t                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n717\t            }\n718\t        }\n719\t    }\n720\t\n721\t    Ok(())\n722\t}\n723\t\n724\tfn cmd_claim(\n725\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n726\t    assignee: &str,\n727\t    _model: Option<String>,\n728\t    _harness: Option<String>,\n729\t    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n730\t    dry_run: bool,\n731\t    format: &str,\n732\t) -> Result<()> {\n733\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n734\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n735\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n736\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n737\t\n738\t    if dry_run {\n739\t        // Show what would be claimed without actually claiming\n740\t        let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n741\t            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n742\t        })?;\n743\t\n744\t        if let Some(candidate) = candidates.first() {\n745\t            match format {\n746\t                \"json\" => {\n747\t                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n748\t                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n749\t                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n750\t                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n751\t                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n752\t                        \"critical_float\": candidate.critical_float,\n753\t                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n754\t                        \"dry_run\": true\n755\t                    });\n756\t                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n757\t                }\n758\t                _ => {\n759\t                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={})\", candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact);\n760\t                }\n761\t            }\n762\t        } else {\n763\t            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n764\t        }\n765\t    } else {\n766\t        let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n767\t        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n768\t            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n769\t        })?;\n770\t\n771\t        match result {\n772\t            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n773\t                match format {\n774\t                    \"json\" => {\n775\t                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n776\t                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n777\t                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n778\t                            \"assignee\": assignee\n779\t                        });\n780\t                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n781\t                    }\n782\t                    _ => {\n783\t                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n784\t                    }\n785\t                }\n786\t            }\n787\t            None => {\n788\t                println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n789\t Commands::Init { .. } => {\n            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n            return match cli.command {\n                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n\n    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n    if !config_path.exists() {\n        let config = format!(\n            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\ndefault_priority: 2\ndefault_type: task\nclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n\"#,\n            prefix\n        );\n        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n    }\n\n    let metadata_path = std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n    }\n\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let gitignore_path = assignee: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    if let Some(s) = status {\n        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    filter.assignee = assignee;\n    filter.priority = priority;\n    filter.limit = limit;\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let issue = {\n        status: Some(Status::Open),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n    })?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    _model: Option<String>,\n    _harness: Option<String>,\n    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n    dry_run: bool,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if dry_run {\n        // Show what would be claimed without actually claiming\n        let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n        })?;\n\n        if let Some(candidate) = candidates.first() {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n                        \"critical_float\": candidate.critical_float,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n                        \"dry_run\": true\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={})\", candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact);\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    } else {\n        let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n        })?;\n\n        match result {\n            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n                match format {\n                    \"json\" => {\n                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                            \"assignee\": assignee\n                        });\n                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n                    }\n                    _ => {\n                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if import_only {\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Imported {} beads\", result.imported);\n    } else if flush_only {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Flushed {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    } else {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n    if repair {\n        std::fs::remove_file(&db_path)?;\n        let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n        let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Repaired database: imported {} beads from JSONL\", result.imported);\n    } else {\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n        println!(\"Database is healthy: {} beads\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = if let Some(s) = status {\n        let filter = IssueFilter {\n            status: Some(Status::from_str(&s).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?),\n            ..Default::default()\n        };\n        storage.list_issues(&filter)?.len()\n    } else {\n        storage.count_issues()?\n    };\n\n    println!(\"{}\", count);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_batch(beads_dir: &PathBuf, file: Option<PathBuf>, json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let ops: Vec<BatchOp> = if let Some(json_str) = json {\n        serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?\n    } else if let Some(file_path) = file {\n        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n    } else if stdin {\n        parse_stdin()?\n    } else {\n        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n    };\n\n    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n\n    // Print results\n    for result in results {\n        if result.status == \"ok\" {\n            if let Some(id) = result.id {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok: {}\", result.op, id);\n            } else {\n                println!(\"[op {}] ok\", result.op);\n            }\n        } else {\n            eprintln!(\"[op {}] error: {}\", result.op, result.error.unwrap_or_default());\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n","numLines":887,"startLine":1,"totalLines":887}}}

 },\n\n    /// Show config file path\n    Path,\n}\n\npub fn run_cli() -> Result<Cli> {\n    Ok(Cli::try_parse()?)\n}\n\npub fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<()> {\n    let workspace = cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n\n    // For init command, we allow the .beads directory to not exist yet\n    match &cli.command {\n        Commands::Init { .. } => {\n            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n            return match cli.command {\n                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n                _ => unreachable!(),\n            };\n        }\n        _ => {}\n    }\n\n    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n\n    match cli.command {\n        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n        }\n        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format } => {\n            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Show { id, format } => cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n        }\n        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n        Commands::Ready { limit, format } => cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format),\n        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, dry_run, format } => {\n            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, dry_run, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n        Commands::Dep(dep) => cmd_dep(&beads_dir, dep),\n        Commands::Label(label) => cmd_label(&beads_dir, label),\n        Commands::Comments(comments) => cmd_comments(&beads_dir, comments),\n        Commands::Search { query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, format } => {\n            cmd_search(&beads_dir, query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Stats { by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, format } => {\n            cmd_stats(&beads_dir, by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, &format)\n        }\n        Commands::Schema { target, format } => cmd_schema(&target, &format),\n        Commands::Config(config) => cmd_config(&beads_dir, config),\n        Commands::Velocity { model, harness, format } => cmd_velocity(&beads_dir, model, harness, &format),\n    }\n}\n\nfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n\n    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n    if !config_path.exists() {\n        let config = format!(\n            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\ndefault_priority: 2\ndefault_type: task\nclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n\"#,\n            prefix\n        );\n        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n    }\n\n    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n    }\n\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n    }\n\n    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_create(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    title: String,\n    type_: String,\n    priority: i32,\n    description: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    labels: Vec<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n    issue.description = description;\n    issue.assignee = assignee;\n    issue.labels = labels;\n\n    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n\n    println!(\"{}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_list(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    type_: Option<String>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n    if let Some(s) = status {\n        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n    }\n    filter.assignee = assignee;\n    filter.priority = priority;\n    filter.limit = limit;\n\n    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issue)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for issue in issues {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&issue)?);\n        }\n        _ => {\n            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n            }\n            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n            }\n            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_update(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    id: &str,\n    title: Option<String>,\n    status: Option<String>,\n    priority: Option<i32>,\n    assignee: Option<String>,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let mut changes = IssueChanges {\n        title,\n        status: status.map(|s| Status::from_str(&s).ok()).flatten(),\n        priority,\n        assignee,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.close_issue(id, reason, \"cli\")?;\n    println!(\"Closed bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_reopen(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let changes = IssueChanges {\n        status: Some(Status::Open),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n\n    storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n    println!(\"Reopened bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        tx.execute(\"DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = ?\", [&id])?;\n        Ok(())\n    })?;\n\n    println!(\"Deleted bead {}\", id);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_ready(beads_dir: &PathBuf, limit: usize, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n    })?;\n\n    match format {\n        \"json\" => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n            }\n        }\n        _ => {\n            for candidate in candidates {\n                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={}, float={})\",\n                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n                    candidate.downstream_impact, candidate.critical_float);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_claim(\n    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n    assignee: &str,\n    _model: Option<String>,\n    _harness: Option<String>,\n    _harness_version: Option<String>,\n    dry_run: bool,\n    format: &str,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if dry_run {\n        // Show what would be claimed without actually claiming\n        let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n        })?;\n\n        if let Some(candidate) = candidates.first() {\n            match format {\n                \"json\" => {\n                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n                        \"critical_float\": candidate.critical_float,\n                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n                        \"dry_run\": true\n                    });\n                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={})\", candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact);\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n        }\n    } else {\n        let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now())\n        })?;\n\n        match result {\n            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed }) => {\n                match format {\n                    \"json\" => {\n                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n                            \"assignee\": assignee\n                        });\n                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n                    }\n                    _ => {\n                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            None => {\n                println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    if import_only {\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Imported {} beads\", result.imported);\n    } else if flush_only {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Flushed {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    } else {\n        let count = storage.sync_to_jsonl(&jsonl_path, false)?;\n        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n    if repair {\n        std::fs::remove_file(&db_path)?;\n        let jsonl_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.jsonl_export);\n        let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let result = storage.sync_from_jsonl(&jsonl_path)?;\n        println!(\"Repaired database: imported {} beads from JSONL\", result.imported);\n    } else {\n        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n        let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n        println!(\"Database is healthy: {} beads\", count);\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n  };\n        storage.list_issues(&filter)?.len()\n    } else {\n        storage.count_issues()?\n    };\n\n    println!(\"{}\", count);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nfn cmd_batch(beads_dir: &PathBuf, file: Option<PathBuf>, json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n    let ops: Vec<BatchOp> = if let Some(json_str) = json {\n        serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?\n    } else if let Some(file_path) = file {\n        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n    } else if stdin {\n        parse_stdin()?\n    } else {\n        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n    };\n\n    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n\n    // Print results\n    for result in results {\n        if result.status == \"ok\" {\n            if let
